heroTitle: Pass your German exam with confidence
heroSubtitle: Prepare for DTZ with an AI mentor. Practice exam-format tasks. Get detailed explanations and feedback in your native language.
heroNote: With good preparation, the exam becomes easier and you feel more confident.
audienceCardOneTitle: I am taking an integration course and want to pass the first time
audienceCardOneText: You may only have one free attempt, or you do not want to lose time on a retake. Prepare in a way that helps you feel confident on exam day.
audienceCardTwoTitle: I did not pass and want to retake the exam
audienceCardTwoText: A retake costs 160 EUR. Practice with exam-format tasks, prepare well, and give yourself the best chance to pass next time.
audienceCardThreeTitle: I am a teacher and want to help my students
audienceCardThreeText: Share the link with your students: they can practice at home, in their own language, and at their own pace. Contact us and we will show you how to follow their progress.
problemTitle: Courses are being cut, but the exam remains
problemIntro: This is the current reality. The DTZ exam is still there, while good preparation is becoming harder and more expensive for many people. This is the reality. But there is a way forward.
problemFactOne: Around 130,000 people are excluded from integration courses in 2026.
problemFactTwo: Some planned courses cannot start because there are not enough approved participants.
problemFactThree: A DTZ retake costs 160 EUR from January 2025.
problemFactFour: Private exam preparation courses often start at 200 EUR online and go higher.
